setup.title: 1 - Account Setup
setup.step1: Go to Settings - Integrations. Enter your Twilio Account SID, Auth Token, and the From Number (or Messaging Service SID) for this account.
setup.step2: Set your business hours (start/end time) and timezone. The engine will never send messages outside these hours.
setup.step3: Set a Daily Send Limit (default 500). This is the max messages the account can send per day across all campaigns.
setup.step4: Copy the API Key (webhook_secret) from Settings. Paste this into your CRM integrations to authorize inbound leads.
setup.tip: The API key is shown once on generation. If lost, regenerate it - the old key will stop working immediately.

campaign.title: 2 - Creating a Campaign
campaign.step1: Go to Campaigns - New Campaign. Give it a name and select the channel (SMS or WhatsApp).
campaign.step2: Write your First Message template. Use merge tags: {{first_name}}, {{agent_name}}, {{service}}.
campaign.step3: Add up to 3 Follow-up bumps. Set the delay in hours for each (e.g., 24h, 48h, 72h). Bumps are sent only if the lead hasn't replied.
campaign.step4: Set Active Hours, Daily Lead Limit, and optionally link a Prompt Library entry to customize the AI's persona.
campaign.step5: Set campaign status to Active when you're ready to start sending.
campaign.tip: Keep the first message short and personal. Avoid links in the first message - many SMS filters block them.

lifecycle.title: 3 - Lead Lifecycle & Statuses
lifecycle.description: Leads move through these automation statuses automatically:
lifecycle.paused: Created but not yet assigned to a campaign. Safe - no messages sent.
lifecycle.queued: Assigned to an active campaign. Campaign_launcher picks this up within 60 seconds.
lifecycle.active: First message sent. Eligible for bumps and AI conversation replies.
lifecycle.completed: All bumps sent, booking confirmed, or lead exhausted. No further messages.
lifecycle.dnd: Lead opted out (replied with STOP or similar). Never contacted again.
lifecycle.tip: To pause a specific lead manually, set their automation_status to "paused" in the lead detail panel. To pause a whole campaign, set campaign status to "Inactive".

webhooks.title: 4 - Source Adapters (CRM Webhooks)
webhooks.description: Each CRM has a dedicated intake URL. Paste the URL into your CRM's webhook settings. Leads are automatically created and queued.
webhooks.tip: Replace YOUR_KEY with the API key from <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink>. Replace ID with the campaign ID from the campaign detail page.

instagram.title: 5 - Instagram Integration
instagram.description: Connect an Instagram Business account to sync existing DM contacts and receive inbound messages.
instagram.step1: Go to Settings - Account. Enter your Instagram User ID (your IG Business Account numeric ID) and Access Token (a long-lived Page access token from Meta).
instagram.step2: Click Sync Instagram Contacts to pull all existing DM conversation contacts from Meta's API. Each unique contact is created as a lead with status paused.
instagram.step3: Assign synced leads to a campaign to start automated outreach, or use them for manual follow-up in the Conversations inbox.
instagram.tip: Meta allows ~200 API calls per hour per token. For accounts with 200+ contacts, the sync may stop early due to rate limiting - just run it again after an hour. Duplicates are automatically skipped.

analytics.title: 6 - Analytics & Reporting
analytics.step1: Lead Scores (0-100) are recalculated every 30 minutes. They combine funnel stage (40%), engagement (30%), and activity recency (30%).
analytics.step2: Campaign Metrics (response rate, booking rate, cost per lead) are snapshotted daily at midnight. Check them under Reports.
analytics.step3: Automation Logs show every step the engine took for every lead - useful for debugging missed sends or unexpected behavior.
analytics.tip: A lead score above 70 = high intent. Prioritize manual follow-up on these.

troubleshoot.title: 10 · Troubleshoot
troubleshoot.notReceivingSolution: Check: campaign status = Active, lead automation_status = queued, business hours not blocking, daily limit not reached. Check Automation Logs for the lead.
troubleshoot.wrongLanguageSolution: Ensure the lead's language field is set. The AI uses this to reply in the correct language.
troubleshoot.stuckSendingSolution: This means Twilio failed to send the first message. Manually reset to 'queued' in the DB and check Twilio credentials.
troubleshoot.duplicateLeadsSolution: Phone-based dedup is per-account. The same phone cannot be in the same account twice. Different accounts can have the same phone.
troubleshoot.aiStoppedSolution: Check Automation Logs for ai_conversation errors. Usually means OpenAI API key issue or rate limit.

what.title: What is LeadAwaker?
what.p1: LeadAwaker is an AI-powered lead follow-up system. When someone expresses interest in your service (fills a form, clicks an ad, etc.), LeadAwaker automatically reaches out via SMS or WhatsApp, nurtures the conversation, and books calls - all on autopilot.
what.p2: The AI agent replies to leads in real time, handles objections, and knows when to stop and let a human take over.

leads.title: Understanding Your Leads
leads.description: Each lead goes through a journey from first contact to booking. Here's what the status indicators mean:
leads.new: Lead just arrived, not yet contacted.
leads.contacted: First message sent. Waiting for a reply.
leads.responded: Lead replied at least once. AI is in conversation.
leads.qualified: Lead has shown interest and is being guided to book a call.
leads.notInterested: Lead opted out or was not a fit.

conversations.title: Reading Conversations
conversations.step1: Open the Leads page and click any lead to view their full conversation history.
conversations.step2: Messages shown on the right side are outbound (sent by the AI or your team). Messages on the left are inbound (from the lead).
conversations.step3: Look for the AI label on messages - these were generated automatically. Messages without this label were sent manually.
conversations.step4: If you want to take over the conversation manually, toggle Manual Takeover on the lead detail. The AI will stop replying and you can message freely.

score.title: Lead Score
score.description: Every lead has a Lead Score from 0 to 100 that estimates how likely they are to book. It's calculated from:
score.factor2: How many times they've replied and how recently (30%)
score.tip: Leads with a score above 70 are your warmest prospects. Prioritize these for manual outreach.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.p1: When the AI detects a booking confirmation in the conversation, the lead is automatically moved to Booked status. The booking date and time are saved to the lead record.
bookings.p2: You can view all upcoming bookings on the Calendar page.
bookings.tip: If a booking appears incorrect or was auto-detected by mistake, manually update the lead status from the detail panel.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can leads tell they're talking to an AI?
faq.a1: The AI is trained to sound natural and human. It doesn't announce itself as a bot unless directly asked or unless your campaign script tells it to.
faq.q2: What happens if a lead says STOP?
faq.a2: They're immediately added to the Do Not Contact list and will never be messaged again by any campaign in your account.
faq.q3: How fast does the AI reply?
faq.a3: Within seconds to a few minutes, depending on message volume. A small delay is added to simulate natural human typing.
faq.q4: Can I message a lead manually?
faq.a4: Yes - enable Manual Takeover on the lead. The AI pauses and you send messages directly from the Conversations page.
faq.q5: What if a lead doesn't respond?
faq.a5: The system sends up to 3 follow-up messages (bumps) at scheduled intervals. After all bumps are exhausted, the lead is marked Completed and automation stops.

items: Documentation page with Operator Manual and Client Guide
Campaign Tags tab - group and organize tags by category
Users management page - roles, avatars, and permissions
Support chat integration in the navigation bar
Instagram contact sync - pull existing DM contacts from Meta's API
Full design system overhaul - new color palette and avatar system
Leads page redesign - split-pane with List, Table, and Kanban views
Calendar page - monthly, weekly, and daily booking views
Conversations inbox - real-time WhatsApp chat interface
Campaigns page - create, manage, and monitor campaigns
Prompt Library - AI persona and script management
Automation Logs - full audit trail for every lead action
Billing & Expenses - BTW/VAT invoice management with PDF upload
